zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Dalston於大約1355年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德時，她的父親John Dalton59歲，母親Joanna Eure57歲。她於1329年與Sir William Thornborough在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年在英國藍卡爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Dalston于大约1355年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德时，她的父亲John Dalton59岁，母亲Joanna Eure57岁。她于1329年与Sir William Thornborough在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1399年在英国藍卡爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  English: locative name from Dalston in Hackney (Middx).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Dalston was born about 1355, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Dalton, was 59 and her mother, Joanna Eure, was 57. She married Sir William Thornborough in 1329, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1399, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Dalston est née environ 1355, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Dalton, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Joanna Eure, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Thornborough en 1329, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1399, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Dalston um 1355 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Dalton 59 und ihre Mutter Joanna Eure 57. Sie hat 1329 in Lancashire, England Sir William Thornborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1399 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Dalston è nata il circa 1355 nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Dalton, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Joanna Eure, aveva 57 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Thornborough nel 1329, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1399, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Dalstonが約1355年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父John Daltonは59歳，母Joanna Eureは57歳であった。1329年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir William Thornboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1399年にイギリスランカシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Dalston(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Dalton(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Eure(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir William Thornborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 랭카실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Dalston nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Dalton, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Eure, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Thornborough em 1329, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1399, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Dalston родилась около 1355 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Dalton было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Eure, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Thornborough в 1329 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1399 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Dalston nació aproximadamente 1355, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Dalton, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Joanna Eure, tenía 57 años. Se casó con Sir William Thornborough en 1329, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1399, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
